channel.title: +वेदान्त-विजयः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +वेदान्त-विजयः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: 1 gurUpasatti vijayaH
item.description:
Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D & Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya Granthamālā - 2

16/1, Sannidhi Street, Kuzhippanthandalam Kancheepuram Dist., Tamil Nadu - 603105 16/1, Sannidhi Street, Kuzhippanthandalam Kancheepuram Dist., Tamil Nadu - 603105 Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D & Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D & Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya Granthamālā - 2 Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya Granthamālā - 2 Printed by: M/s Flash Offset 111 B, Balaji Garden Thindal Erode - 12 email: flashoffset02@gmail.com All rights reserved. item.title: २ अद्वैत-विजयः
item.description:
Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D & Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D & Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D

ACKNOWLEDGEMENT We, on behalf of Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya Granthasaṁrakṣaṇa Saṁsthā, are happy to publish our third volume of the works of Caṇḍamarutam Mahācārya (renowned Caṇḍamārutam Doḍḍācārya), one of the stalwarts on Viśiṣṭādvaita School of Śrī Rāmānuja, on the special occasion of 650th birthday celebrations of our great Ācārya Śri Maṇvāḷa Māmuni (Varavara muni). The Present publication of Advaitavidyāvijaya is the fourth part of Vedāntavijaya authored by Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya. Gurūpasadanavijaya and Brahmavidyāvijya had been already published by us.
Śrī Ubhayavedāntācārya Tirunarayanapuram Araiyar Sriramasarma Svamin has given his kind helping hand by way of suggestions, corrections and citations. In addition, this Svāmin has given the plan of dividing three major parts to five chapters for better understanding. We are grateful to this Svamin. This way, we have tried out best to present this critical edition. Maximum original quotations are provided in the footnotes for the easy and convenient reading and understanding of the textual context. We are thankful to Vidvan Srihari, who had dedicated himself in the activities of Sampradāya and who, on behalf of Śrī. U.Ve. Tirunarayanapuram Araiyar Sriramasarma Svamin, has helped us to get the corrected copy of above work. We are thankful to the authorities of Rashtriya Sanskrit Vidyapeetham, (Tirupati), Sri Venkateshwara Oriental Research Institute (Tirupati), Ananthacharya Indological Research Institute (Mumbai), Oriental Research Institute (Mysuru) and Lal Bahadur Visvavidyapeetham (Delhi), for permitting us to use the manuscripts in their custody. We are also thankful to all our friends who helped in this project in different ways, in addition to Sriman Rajan of M/s RNR Printers and Publishers, Triplicane, Chennai, for neatly printing this book. Vijayollāsa (including Parikaravijaya), the fifth part of Vedāntavijaya is in progress. With the benevolent grace of our Lord Śrimannārāyaṇa, all the treatises are to be published with translation in near future. K.K.C. LAKSHMI NARASIMHAN General Editor & Publisher

item.title: ५ विजयोल्लास (परिकरविजय)
item.description:
CriticallyEditedby Dr.K.K.C.S.BadhriNarayanan VyakaranaSiromani,M.A.,M.Phil,B.Ed,Ph.D CriticallyEditedby Dr.K.K.C.S.BadhriNarayanan VyakaranaSiromani,M.A.,M.Phil,B.Ed,Ph.D & Dr.K.K.C.LakshmiNarasimhan VyakaranaSiromani,M.A.,B.Ed,Ph.D & Dr.K.K.C.LakshmiNarasimhan VyakaranaSiromani,M.A.,B.Ed,Ph.D Price:Rs.150/- विषयसूचिका (CONTENTS)

Page Preface iv प्रस्तावना (Foreword ) (Sanskrit) v प्रस्तावना (Foreword ) (Tamil) xvi चण्डमारुत-महाचार्यवैभवम्
(Candamāruta Mahācārya Vaibhava) (Sanskrit)

xxii चण्डमारुत-महाचार्यवैभवम्
(Candamāruta Mahācārya Vaibhava) (Tamil) xxix उपयुक्तग्रन्थानां संकेतसूची (Abbreviations) xxxi उपयुक्तमुख्यग्रन्थाः (Select Bibliography) xxxiv विजयोल्लास-परिकरविजयग्रन्थमातृकाकोशविवरणम् (List of Manuscripts consulted) xxxvi विजयोल्लास-परिकरविजयविषयाः
१. ब्रह्मविदनुकम्पाभ्यर्थनम्
(नारायणपरत्वम्, तत्त्वभागः) 1 २. सतां लक्षणम् (अनुष्ठानभागः)
(अ) तप्तचक्रादिधारणविधिः 122 (आ) ऊर्ध्वपुण्ड्रधारणविधिः 160 (इ) श्रीपाञ्चरात्रस्य वेदतुल्यं प्रामाण्यम् 168 (ई) असतां लक्षणविमर्शः 226 (उ) भागवतानां सन्तः इति शास्त्रीयः व्यवहारः227 (ऊ) भगवच्छब्दः परब्रह्मणः वासुदेवस्यैव वाचकः 232 (ऋ) भागवतजनमाहात्म्यम्235

item.title: ब्रह्म-विद्या-विजयः
item.description:
Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D

Critically Edited by Dr. K.K.C.S. Badhri Narayanan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., M. Phil, B.Ed, Ph.D 16/1, Sannidhi Street, Kuzhippanthandalam Kancheepuram Dist., Tamil Nadu - 603105 Foreword by Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan Vyakarana Siromani, M.A., B.Ed, Ph.D Printed by: M/s Flash Offset 111 B, Balaji Garden Thindal Erode - 12 All rights reserved. Lakshmi Narasimhan Copyright: Dr. K.K.C. Lakshmi Narasimhan First Edition 2017 (Email: kkcln3@gmail.com) DEVOTEDLY OFFERED TO AND ALL OUR PŪRVĀCĀRYAS विषयसूचिका (CONTENTS) पुट संख्या Page Foreword i Acknowledgements iv उपयुक्तग्रन्थानां संकेतसूची
(Abbreviations)
v ब्रह्मविद्याविजयग्रन्थमातृकाकोशविवरणम्
(List of Manuscripts consulted) vii चण्डमारुत-महाचार्यवैभवम्
(Caṇḍamāruta Mahācārya Vaibhava)
viii ब्रह्मविद्याविजये प्रतिपादितविषयसंग्रहः (Contents of Brahmavidyāvijaya) xiii ब्रह्मविद्याविजये
१.देवतान्तरस्य परविद्यावेद्यत्वभङ्गः १ २. देवतान्तरस्यान्तरादित्यविद्यावेद्यत्वभङ्गः १० ३. देवतान्तरस्यान्तरक्षिविद्यावेद्यत्वभङ्गः ५६ ४. दहरविद्यावेद्यत्वभङ्गः ५७ उपयुक्तमुख्यग्रन्थाः
(Select Bibliography) १९२
